meta.summary: MAFFT 7.525 multiple sequence alignment suite from the official with-extensions source package, including core strategies, aliases, profile/distance helpers, and RNA structural alignment helpers.
meta.description: MAFFT 7.525 multiple sequence alignment suite from the official with-extensions source package, including core strategies, aliases, profile/distance helpers, and RNA structural alignment helpers.

test: mafft --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'v7.525 (2024/Mar/13)' >/dev/null
mafft --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'MAFFT v7.525' >/dev/null && mafft --man 2>&1 | grep -F 'Multiple alignment program' >/dev/null

mafft-linsi --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'MAFFT v7.525' >/dev/null && mafft-ginsi --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'MAFFT v7.525' >/dev/null && mafft-einsi --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'MAFFT v7.525' >/dev/null && mafft-qinsi --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'MAFFT v7.525' >/dev/null && mafft-xinsi --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'MAFFT v7.525' >/dev/null

test -x /opt/mafft/libexec/mafft/mxscarnamod && test -x /opt/mafft/libexec/mafft/dash_client && ruby -c /opt/mafft/bin/mafft-homologs.rb >/dev/null && ruby -c /opt/mafft/bin/mafft-sparsecore.rb >/dev/null && perl -c /opt/mafft/libexec/mafft/mafftash_premafft.pl >/dev/null && perl -c /opt/mafft/libexec/mafft/seekquencer_premafft.pl >/dev/null && ldd /opt/mafft/libexec/mafft/tbfast | grep -F libc >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-mafft-core && cd /tmp/taf-mafft-core && printf '>seq1
ACGTACGTACGT
>seq2
ACGTCGTTACGT
>seq3
ACGTTGCAACGT
' > dna.fa && mafft --thread 1 --quiet dna.fa > aligned.fa && test "$(grep -c '^>' aligned.fa)" = 3

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-mafft-accuracy && cd /tmp/taf-mafft-accuracy && printf '>seq1
ACGTACGTACGT
>seq2
ACGTCGTTACGT
>seq3
ACGTTGCAACGT
' > dna.fa && linsi --thread 1 --quiet dna.fa > linsi.fa && ginsi --thread 1 --quiet dna.fa > ginsi.fa && einsi --thread 1 --quiet dna.fa > einsi.fa && test "$(grep -c '^>' linsi.fa)" = 3 && test "$(grep -c '^>' ginsi.fa)" = 3 && test "$(grep -c '^>' einsi.fa)" = 3

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-mafft-fast && cd /tmp/taf-mafft-fast && printf '>seq1
ACGTACGTACGT
>seq2
ACGTCGTTACGT
>seq3
ACGTTGCAACGT
' > dna.fa && fftns --thread 1 --quiet dna.fa > fftns.fa && fftnsi --thread 1 --quiet dna.fa > fftnsi.fa && nwns --thread 1 --quiet dna.fa > nwns.fa && nwnsi --thread 1 --quiet dna.fa > nwnsi.fa && test "$(grep -c '^>' fftns.fa)" = 3 && test "$(grep -c '^>' fftnsi.fa)" = 3 && test "$(grep -c '^>' nwns.fa)" = 3 && test "$(grep -c '^>' nwnsi.fa)" = 3

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-mafft-profile && cd /tmp/taf-mafft-profile && printf '>p1
ACGTACGT
>p2
ACGTTCGT
' > profile1.fa && printf '>p3
ACGTACGA
>p4
ACGTTTGA
' > profile2.fa && mafft-profile profile1.fa profile2.fa > profile.fa && test "$(grep -c '^>' profile.fa)" = 4 && printf '>seq1
ACGTACGTACGT
>seq2
ACGTCGTTACGT
>seq3
ACGTTGCAACGT
' > dna.fa && mafft-distance dna.fa > distance.tsv && test -s distance.tsv

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-mafft-rna && cd /tmp/taf-mafft-rna && cp /opt/mafft/share/doc/mafft/test/samplerna rna.fa && mafft-qinsi --thread 1 --quiet rna.fa > qinsi.fa && mafft-xinsi --thread 1 --quiet rna.fa > xinsi.fa && grep -q '^>' qinsi.fa && grep -q '^>' xinsi.fa
mafft-sparsecore.rb 2>&1 | grep -F 'Give input file with -i.' >/dev/null && mafft-homologs.rb --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: mafft-homologs' >/dev/null

upstream.name: MAFFT
upstream.citation: Katoh and Standley 2013; Katoh et al. 2002
